app.name: WellMama
app.title: Your Complete
app.description: Professional-grade health calculators and trackers designed for every stage of your journey — from fertility planning to postpartum care.
app.noToolsFound: No tools found matching your search.
app.medicalDisclaimer: These tools are for informational and educational purposes only. They do not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult with qualified healthcare professionals for medical decisions.
app.footer: For informational purposes only. Always consult your healthcare provider.

dueDateCalculator.title: Due Date Calculator
dueDateCalculator.description: Calculate your estimated due date based on your last menstrual period or conception date.

pregnancyBmi.title: Pregnancy BMI
pregnancyBmi.description: Calculate your BMI and recommended weight gain during pregnancy.

fetalGrowth.title: Fetal Growth Tracker
fetalGrowth.description: Track your baby's growth week by week with size comparisons.

kickCounter.title: Kick Counter
kickCounter.description: Track your baby's movements to monitor fetal activity and wellbeing.

gestationalDiabetes.title: GDM Risk Assessment
gestationalDiabetes.description: Assess your risk factors for gestational diabetes mellitus.

preeclampsiaRisk.title: Preeclampsia Risk
preeclampsiaRisk.description: Evaluate risk factors for preeclampsia during pregnancy.

safeMedications.title: Safe Medications
safeMedications.description: Quick reference guide for medication safety during pregnancy and breastfeeding.

exerciseGuide.title: Exercise Guide
exerciseGuide.description: Safe exercise recommendations for each trimester of pregnancy.

waterIntake.title: Water Intake Tracker
waterIntake.description: Track daily hydration goals especially important during pregnancy.

vaccinationSchedule.title: Vaccination Schedule
vaccinationSchedule.description: Recommended vaccination timeline during pregnancy and for newborns.

hospitalBag.title: Hospital Bag Checklist
hospitalBag.description: Complete checklist to prepare your hospital bag for delivery.

contractionTimer.title: Contraction Timer
contractionTimer.description: Time your contractions to know when it's time to head to the hospital.

ppdScreener.title: PPD Screener (EPDS)
ppdScreener.description: Edinburgh Postnatal Depression Scale screening questionnaire.

breastfeedingTracker.title: Breastfeeding Tracker
breastfeedingTracker.description: Log feeding sessions, duration, and track your baby's feeding patterns.

ovulationCalculator.title: Ovulation Calculator
ovulationCalculator.description: Track your fertile window and predict ovulation dates based on your menstrual cycle.

cycleTracker.title: Cycle Tracker
cycleTracker.description: Log and track your menstrual cycles, symptoms, and patterns over time.

bloodType.title: Blood Type Calculator
bloodType.description: Predict possible blood types for your baby based on parents' blood types.

weightGain.title: Weight Gain Calculator
weightGain.description: Track healthy weight gain during pregnancy based on your BMI.

pregnancyDiary.title: Pregnancy Diary
pregnancyDiary.description: Document your pregnancy journey with notes, symptoms, and memories.

nutritionGuide.title: Nutrition Guide
nutritionGuide.description: Essential nutrients and dietary recommendations for a healthy pregnancy.

forbiddenFoods.title: Forbidden Foods
forbiddenFoods.description: List of foods to avoid during pregnancy for safety.

babySleepTracker.title: Baby Sleep Tracker
babySleepTracker.description: Track your baby's sleep patterns and duration.

diaperTracker.title: Diaper Tracker
diaperTracker.description: Log diaper changes to monitor your baby's health.

babyGrowth.title: Baby Growth Calculator
babyGrowth.description: Track your baby's growth with WHO standard percentiles.

vaccinationGuide.title: Vaccination Guide
vaccinationGuide.description: Comprehensive vaccination schedule for your baby's first years.

genderPredictor.title: Gender Predictor
genderPredictor.description: Fun Chinese calendar prediction for baby's gender (for entertainment only).

conceptionCalculator.title: Conception Calculator
conceptionCalculator.description: Estimate your conception date based on due date or last period.

breathingExercises.title: Breathing Exercises
breathingExercises.description: Guided breathing techniques for relaxation during pregnancy and labor.

moodDiary.title: Mood Diary
moodDiary.description: Track your emotional wellbeing throughout pregnancy and postpartum.

yogaGuide.title: Prenatal Yoga
yogaGuide.description: Safe yoga poses for each trimester to stay active and relaxed.

affirmations.title: Positive Affirmations
affirmations.description: Daily affirmations to support your mental wellbeing during pregnancy.

subscription.trialDaysLeft: {{days}} days left in your free trial

dueDatePage.title: Due Date Calculator
dueDatePage.subtitle: Estimate when your baby will arrive
dueDatePage.lmpLabel: First Day of Last Menstrual Period
dueDatePage.info: Only about 5% of babies are born on their exact due date. Most are born within 2 weeks before or after. Your healthcare provider may adjust your due date based on ultrasound measurements.

kickCounterPage.title: Kick Counter
kickCounterPage.subtitle: Count 10 kicks to monitor fetal activity
kickCounterPage.goal: Goal: 10 kicks in 2 hours or less
kickCounterPage.info: Starting at 28 weeks, count fetal movements daily. Contact your healthcare provider if you notice decreased movement or don't reach 10 kicks in 2 hours.

contractionPage.title: Contraction Timer
contractionPage.subtitle: Track duration and frequency of contractions
contractionPage.callProviderDesc: Contractions are 5 minutes apart and lasting 45+ seconds. Consider heading to the hospital.
contractionPage.rule511Desc: Call your provider when contractions are 5 minutes apart, lasting 1 minute each, for at least 1 hour.

waterPage.title: Water Intake Tracker
waterPage.subtitle: Stay hydrated during pregnancy — aim for 10+ glasses daily

hospitalBagPage.title: Hospital Bag Checklist
hospitalBagPage.info: Pack your bag around 36 weeks. Keep it somewhere easy to grab, and make sure your partner knows where it is!

conceptionPage.info: Conception typically occurs around ovulation, 14 days before your next expected period. The fertile window spans 5 days before and 1 day after ovulation.

diaryPage.title: Pregnancy Diary
diaryPage.noEntries: No entries yet. Start documenting your journey!

genderPredictorPage.title: Gender Predictor
genderPredictorPage.disclaimer: For entertainment only - not medically accurate
